description: Unique assay identifier combining GeneLab dataset accession and MD5 hash of metadata (links assay to dataset and ensures version integrity)
Human-readable assay title detailing the biological measurement performed
Technology type from API endpoint investigation.study assays.study assay technology type (e.g., RNA Sequencing, mass spectrometry, imaging)
Measurement type from API endpoint investigation.study assays.study assay measurement type, serving as a higher-level categorization of the technology type
Full OSDR assay name from id.assay name
Number of samples in this assay
Sequencing or array platform from assay.parameter value.sequencing platform or array design ref
Library strategy from assay.parameter value.library strategy
Single-end or paired-end from assay.parameter value.library layout
Instrument model from assay.parameter value.sequencing instrument
Library preparation kit from assay.parameter value.library kit
example: Illumina TruSeq RNA Sample Preparation Kit

description: Library selection method from assay.parameter value.library selection
Whether GeneLab processed data exists for this assay based on file.category
